displayName: United Arab Emirates – Golden Visa (Long-Term Residence)
shortDescription: 5–10 year residence · Investor · Talent · Property · Entrepreneur · India route

policyAlert.summary: Golden Visa categories have distinct investment/salary thresholds. Verify ICP category criteria before quoting.

alert.title: Category-specific thresholds
alert.body: Investor, real estate (AED 2M+), talented professional, entrepreneur, scientist, and outstanding student routes have different evidence requirements.

about.label: Description
about.value: Long-term UAE residence visa (typically 5 or 10 years) for investors, property owners, entrepreneurs, talented professionals, scientists, and outstanding students without employer sponsorship requirement in many categories.

about.label: Eligible categories
about.value: Investor/partner · Real estate (AED 2M+ property) · Entrepreneur · Talented professional (salary AED 30k+/15k+ with conditions) · Scientist/researcher · Outstanding student (95%+ / top graduates)

about.label: Property route
about.value: Own fully paid property worth AED 2 million+ (mortgage rules apply — verify ICP current criteria).

about.label: Key authority
about.value: ICP UAE Golden Visa services · Emirate-specific nomination (GDRFA, ADRO, etc.)

about.label: After approval
about.value: Medical, Emirates ID, long-term residence stamping; sponsor self or family dependants per category rules.

eligibility.note: Bank letters, title deed, salary certs, awards

redFlagsBanner: Property valuation and mortgage status are common Golden Visa failure points — verify with ICP before client commits.

faqs.q: Can Golden Visa holder work anywhere?
faqs.a: Many categories allow self-sponsorship; verify work rights for specific Golden Visa type.

faqs.q: Can family be included?
faqs.a: Spouse and children often sponsored under main holder — verify category rules.

faqs.q: Property off-plan eligible?
faqs.a: Rules vary — fully paid and handover status matter; verify ICP current policy.

faqs.q: What is Description for this service?
faqs.a: Long-term UAE residence visa (typically 5 or 10 years) for investors, property owners, entrepreneurs, talented professionals, scientists, and outstanding students without employer sponsorship requirement in many categories.

faqs.q: What is Eligible categories for this service?
faqs.a: Investor/partner · Real estate (AED 2M+ property) · Entrepreneur · Talented professional (salary AED 30k+/15k+ with conditions) · Scientist/researcher · Outstanding student (95%+ / top graduates)

faqs.q: What is Property route for this service?
faqs.a: Own fully paid property worth AED 2 million+ (mortgage rules apply — verify ICP current criteria).

faqs.q: What is Key authority for this service?
faqs.a: ICP UAE Golden Visa services · Emirate-specific nomination (GDRFA, ADRO, etc.)

faqs.q: What is After approval for this service?
faqs.a: Medical, Emirates ID, long-term residence stamping; sponsor self or family dependants per category rules.

faqs.q: Is Qualifying category identified (investor/talent/property/etc.) required?
faqs.a: Qualifying category identified (investor/talent/property/etc.) is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Threshold investment/salary/achievement met required?
faqs.a: Category-specific

faqs.q: Is Passport valid 6+ months required?
faqs.a: Passport valid 6+ months is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Clean UAE immigration history required?
faqs.a: Clean UAE immigration history is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Medical fitness required?
faqs.a: Medical fitness is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Category-specific evidence bundle complete required?
faqs.a: Bank letters, title deed, salary certs, awards

faqs.q: Can Future Link guarantee approval?
faqs.a: No. Government authorities decide each case. Never promise approval.

faqs.q: What documents should we collect first?
faqs.a: Passport, application forms, fees, and the service checklist in the Checklist tab.

faqs.q: How long does processing take?
faqs.a: See KPI processing time — always verify current GDRFA/ICP timelines before quoting.

faqs.q: What are government fees?
faqs.a: Confirm latest fees on the official portal in the Resources section before quoting.

faqs.q: Can the client apply from India?
faqs.a: Yes — standard route for Indian nationals via sponsor, VFS, or ICP e-visa as applicable.

faqs.q: What if the client was refused before?
faqs.a: Disclose all refusals, overstays, and bans; address GDRFA fines before reapply.

faqs.q: Can the client work on this visa?
faqs.a: Work rights depend on visa type — employment visa required for full-time work.

faqs.q: United Arab Emirates – Golden Visa (Long-Term Residence): counselor verification point 22?
faqs.a: Confirm eligibility, checklist sign-off, current fees, and client consent before submission.

compliance: Client service agreement and consent must be on file before submission
Never guarantee visa or immigration approval; use approved-language only
Fee quotes must separate consultancy, government, and third-party costs
Verify licensed institution or employer before collecting full fees
proTips: Check Visa Bulletin monthly with client
Maintain lawful status during entire wait
PERM with experienced attorney—DOL audits real
Document AC21 eligibility if changing jobs post-I-140
Set realistic timeline expectations at sales stage
postApproval: Guide on SS card and state ID
